data.content:
Implementation complete on branch 260e/retire-wizard at commit ed2f442311b168b8eed3feb84c81439647e0f23b.

Deleted: scripts/setup.sh, agent-wizard.sh, dispatch-pools.sh, model-picker.sh, toml-reader.sh,
test-setup-scan-unmounted.sh, test-install-copilot-setup.sh, test-model-picker.sh,
test-model-picker-integration.sh, and 5 vitest specs that sourced those shells.

Rewrote setup_cmd in scripts/install.sh (see new SETUP_AGENT_PREFERENCE
array and setup_resolve_agent/setup_invoke_agent/setup_fail_no_agent).
Preference: claude, codex, opencode, gemini, copilot; FOOLERY_SETUP_AGENT
override honored; loud-fail path with UI fallback banner.

build-runtime-artifact.sh now copies .claude/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md
into the runtime tarball at foolery-runtime/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md.

New test coverage in src/lib/__tests__/install-setup-cmd.test.ts (6 tests)
exercises: stdin-to-claude, codex-fallback, FOOLERY_SETUP_AGENT override,
no-CLI loud fail, bad-override loud fail, missing skill fail.

Local verification:
- bash -n scripts/install.sh OK
- bun run lint OK
- bunx tsc --noEmit OK
- bun run test OK (264 files, 2708 passed, 11 skip, 42 todo)
- bun run build OK
- bash scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh OK; SKILL.md in tarball byte-identical to source.
- grep for setup.sh|agent-wizard|dispatch-pools|model-picker|toml-reader
  across .ts/.tsx/.sh/.md/.json: no live refs (only CHANGELOG, audit doc,
  schemas.ts description - the latter outside the do-not-touch list).

Review artifact: origin/260e/retire-wizard.
